I

isAdmin() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Session
Checks if the current user is an admin.
isAdmin() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.User
Checks if this user is an administrator.
isDeleted() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Customer
Checks if this customer has been deleted (soft delete).
isDeleted() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Flight
Checks if this flight has been deleted (soft delete).
isLoggedIn() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Session
Checks if a user is currently logged in.
isPassenger() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Session
Checks if the current user is a passenger.
isPassenger() - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.User
Checks if this user is a passenger.
IssueBooking - Class in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.commands
Command to issue (create) a new booking for a customer on a flight.

Constructs a new instance of this class.

GUI window for creating a new booking.

Validates password strength.
